process.title: My Work Process
process.subtitle: A clear, collaborative, and iterative approach from idea to launch.

steps.title: Discovery Session
steps.description: We hop on a call to understand your goals, target audience, and project requirements. No fluff — just clarity.

steps.title: Strategy Mapping
steps.description: I map out the full project plan — tech stack, timeline, milestones, and deliverables — so you know exactly what to expect.

steps.title: Build & Iterate
steps.description: I build fast and share progress regularly. You give feedback, I iterate — until every pixel is right and every workflow is smooth.

steps.title: Final Delivery
steps.description: Clean handoff with full documentation, source files, and post-launch support. You leave with a product that works.

faq.question: Why should I hire you?
faq.answer: I specialize in the full spectrum — UX/UI design, web development, AI automation, and video. Instead of hiring 3 separate freelancers, you get one person who understands how all the pieces fit together. Every project is delivered on time, with clear communication throughout.

faq.question: How long will my project take?
faq.answer: A simple landing page takes 3–5 days. A full website takes 1–3 weeks. AI automation setups typically take 1–2 weeks depending on complexity. I always provide a clear timeline before starting, and I stick to it.

faq.question: How does your revision process work?
faq.answer: I share progress at key milestones so there are no surprises. Starter plan includes 1 round, Premium includes unlimited revisions. I keep iterating until you're 100% happy — your satisfaction is the metric that matters.

faq.question: Do you offer post-launch maintenance?
faq.answer: Yes. Every plan includes post-launch support — bug fixes, content updates, performance optimizations. For ongoing retainer work, I offer monthly packages that keep your digital products healthy and up to date.

faq.question: What's your refund policy?
faq.answer: Refunds are available if the delivered work doesn't match what was agreed upon. Since each project involves significant time and effort, change-of-mind refunds aren't offered — but I always resolve issues and will iterate until you're satisfied.

faq.question: Can I pay by credit card?
faq.answer: Yes — I accept secure credit card payments via Stripe, as well as PayPal, bank transfer, and Upwork/Fiverr milestone payments. You'll receive a proper invoice for every transaction.
